query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='pve_up' AND JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name')!='' ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='pve_up' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='pve_up' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels,'id') LIKE 'node/%' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='pve_up' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='pve_up' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels,'id') LIKE 'qemu/%' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='pve_up' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='pve_up' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels,'id') LIKE 'lxc/%' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='pve_up' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='pve_up' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels,'id') LIKE 'storage/%' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, host_name, avg(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'host.name') AS host_name, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.cpu.load_average.1m' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.cpu.load_average.1m' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, host_name, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, host_name ORDER BY time

SELECT time, host_name, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'host.name') AS host_name, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.memory.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.memory.usage' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels,'state')='used' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, host_name, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, host_name ORDER BY time

SELECT host_name, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'host.name') AS host_name, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.filesystem.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.filesystem.usage' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels,'state')='used' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY fp, host_name, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY host_name ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT time, concat(host_name,' ',direction) AS series, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, host_name, direction, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'host.name') AS host_name, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'direction') AS direction, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.network.io' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.network.io' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, host_name, direction, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT name, value FROM (SELECT g.name AS name, anyLast(m.v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'id') AS id, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='pve_cpu_usage_ratio' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='pve_cpu_usage_ratio' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels,'id') LIKE 'qemu/%' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, id, cluster) m INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels,'id') AS id, JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(labels,'name') AS name FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='pve_guest_info') g ON m.id=g.id AND m.cluster=g.cluster WHERE m.cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY g.name) ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT time, name, avg(v) AS value FROM (SELECT m.time AS time, g.name AS name, m.v AS v FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'id') AS id, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='pve_cpu_usage_ratio' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='pve_cpu_usage_ratio' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels,'id') LIKE 'qemu/%' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, id, cluster) m INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels,'id') AS id, JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(labels,'name') AS name FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='pve_guest_info') g ON m.id=g.id AND m.cluster=g.cluster WHERE m.cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote})) GROUP BY time, name ORDER BY time

SELECT time, name, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT m.time AS time, m.fp AS fp, g.name AS name, m.v AS v FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'id') AS id, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='pve_memory_usage_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='pve_memory_usage_bytes' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels,'id') LIKE 'qemu/%' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, id, cluster) m INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels,'id') AS id, JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(labels,'name') AS name FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='pve_guest_info') g ON m.id=g.id AND m.cluster=g.cluster WHERE m.cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote})) GROUP BY time, name ORDER BY time

SELECT storage_node, value FROM (SELECT concat(g.storage,' (',g.node,')') AS storage_node, anyLast(m.v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'id') AS id, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='pve_disk_usage_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='pve_disk_usage_bytes' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels,'id') LIKE 'storage/%' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, id, cluster) m INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels,'id') AS id, JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(labels,'storage') AS storage, JSONExtractString(labels,'node') AS node FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='pve_storage_info') g ON m.id=g.id AND m.cluster=g.cluster WHERE m.cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY g.storage, g.node) ORDER BY value DESC
